description.value: KiTEC Industries (India) Private Limited, based in Silvassa, specializes in providing advanced solutions for small diameter piping systems, featuring a range of Brass Internal Sealing Fittings (1014 to 4050). The company's commitment to quality and excellence is underscored by its recognition as ASSOCHAM Global Quality Excellence SME of the Year, the ESQR Award 2025, and its membership with IGBC.

address.value: 8, Madhuban Industrial Area, Madhuban Dam Road, Rakholi, Silvassa, Dadra And Nagar Haveli, Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu, 396230

media_assets.visual_description: The image is a grayscale technical diagram illustrating the components of a pipe fitting assembly. It shows a dark cylindrical pipe connected to a light gray hexagonal nut, a dark split ring, multiple dark 'O' rings, and a light gray threaded fitting. The components are laid out on a plain light background with labels pointing to each part.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Grayscale technical diagram showing components of a pipe fitting assembly: pipe, nut, split ring, O-rings, and fitting.

visual_features.color_appearance: dark grey/black for the main body, metallic silver/grey for the end component
visual_features.presentation: studio shot with solid grey background

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a long, dark, cylindrical industrial component, possibly a fitting, positioned diagonally against a solid grey background. One end of the cylinder features a metallic silver-grey threaded component with several thin, rod-like structures extending outwards. The overall image quality is low, making fine details indistinct.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A dark cylindrical industrial fitting with a metallic silver-grey threaded end and thin rods, set against a solid grey background.

visual_features.color_appearance: dark grey, black, white, silver-toned, copper-toned
visual_features.additional_visual_notes: labeled components including pipe, nut, split ring, O-rings, and fitting, illustrating assembly
